attractions.name: Maya Bay
attractions.description: One of Thailand's most iconic beaches, surrounded by towering limestone cliffs and powdery white sand, featured in the movie The Beach

attractions.name: Pileh Lagoon
attractions.description: Often called the Emerald Lagoon, this beautiful inlet is surrounded by towering cliffs and filled with crystal-clear water

attractions.name: Viking Cave
attractions.description: Famous for ancient wall paintings and bird nest harvesting used in traditional Thai bird's nest soup

attractions.name: Monkey Beach
attractions.description: Home to playful wild monkeys often seen near the shoreline, also great for snorkeling
